pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot parent version from 2.7.18 to 3.3.13 to align with Java 17 and modern Spring ecosystem.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 3.x requires Java 17 as a baseline; running Boot 3.x on Java 11 results in runtime errors due to missing APIs and bytecode incompatibility.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update the managed Java version property from 11 to 17 to ensure compilation and runtime target the correct JDK.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 3.x enforces Java 17; compiling with Java 11 settings against Boot 3.x dependencies causes compilation failures or runtime NoSuchMethodError.

pom.xml.general_idea: Remove deprecated Springfox Swagger dependencies which are incompatible with Spring Boot 3.x.
pom.xml.why_exists: Springfox relies on internal Spring MVC APIs removed or changed in Spring 6/Boot 3, causing compilation errors or runtime failures.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add springdoc-openapi-starter-webmvc-ui as the modern replacement for Swagger documentation in Spring Boot 3.
pom.xml.why_exists: Without a compatible OpenAPI library, API documentation endpoints will fail to start or function correctly in Boot 3.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add lombok-mapstruct-binding to ensure compatibility between Lombok and MapStruct during annotation processing.
pom.xml.why_exists: Without this binding, MapStruct may fail to generate correct code when Lombok is used, causing compilation errors in mapper implementations.

src/main/java/com/oauth/rest/model/UserE.general_idea: Migrate JPA annotations from javax.persistence to jakarta.persistence package.
src/main/java/com/oauth/rest/model/UserE.why_exists: javax.persistence package is removed in Jakarta EE 9+ (Spring Boot 3), causing compile errors for missing classes.

src/main/java/com/oauth/rest/security/Se.general_idea: Add static import for Spring Security 6 Customizer helper to enable lambda-based configuration.
src/main/java/com/oauth/rest/security/Se.why_exists: The withDefaults() method is used in the new configuration style and requires this import to compile.

src/main/java/com/oauth/rest/security/Se.general_idea: Replace deprecated WebSecurityConfigurerAdapter with lambda-based HttpSecurity configuration.
src/main/java/com/oauth/rest/security/Se.why_exists: WebSecurityConfigurerAdapter is deprecated in Spring Security 5.7 and removed in Spring Security 6; the old fluent API methods like .and() and .authorizeRequests() are no longer available.

src/main/java/com/oauth/rest/security/oa.general_idea: Migrate HttpSecurity configuration from deprecated method references to lambda-based DSL required by Spring Security 6.
src/main/java/com/oauth/rest/security/oa.why_exists: The methods csrf(), sessionManagement(), authorizeRequests(), and headers() returning builder objects are removed in Spring Security 6; using them causes a compilation error.

src/main/java/com/oauth/rest/security/oa.general_idea: Replace deprecated antMatchers with requestMatchers in Spring Security authorization rules.
src/main/java/com/oauth/rest/security/oa.why_exists: The method antMatchers() is removed in Spring Security 6; using it causes a compilation error.

src/main/java/com/oauth/rest/security/oa.general_idea: Update headers configuration to use lambda DSL for frameOptions in Spring Security 6.
src/main/java/com/oauth/rest/security/oa.why_exists: The method headers().frameOptions().disable() chain is removed in Spring Security 6; using it causes a compilation error.
